We are given the recurrence \( y[n] - 3y[n-1] + 2y[n-2] = 0 \) with \( y[0] = 2 \), \( y[1] = 3 \).  

For \( n = 2 \):  
\( y[2] - 3y[1] + 2y[0] = y[2] - 9 + 4 = 0 \Rightarrow y[2] = 5 \).  

For \( n = 3 \):  
\( y[3] - 3y[2] + 2y[1] = y[3] - 15 + 6 = 0 \Rightarrow y[3] = 9 \).
